name: Dog Bisquits
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hot water or meat juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot water or juice over margarine.
2. Add powdered milk, salt, sugar, and egg to the mixture.
3. Gradually add flour, about 1/2 cup at a time, until you have a stiff dough.
4. Knead for 3-4 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch and cut into shapes.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
